emails.subject: FW: American Airlines ISDA
emails.body: FW: American Airlines ISDA Any idea where this stands? To: Taylor, Mark E (Legal)

emails.subject: RE: American Airlines ISDA
emails.body: RE: American Airlines ISDA I did the comparison and gave it to Mary to review. Credit is deciding what to do in light of the problems with the airlines. To: Heard, Marie

emails.subject: FW: American Airlines ISDA
emails.body: FW: American Airlines ISDA Marie can you please check on this and let Richard know where we stand. Thanks! To: Taylor, Mark E (Legal)

emails.subject: FW: American Airlines ISDA
emails.body: FW: American Airlines ISDA Marie can you please check on this and let Richard know where we stand. Thanks! To: Taylor, Mark E (Legal)

emails.subject: RE: American Airlines ISDA
emails.body: RE: American Airlines ISDA Richard: Credit is not throwing you off. They did send a revised worksheet. I turned around comments and they have been reviewed by a lawyer. I am working on finalizing our comments to send back to AA today. Marie To: Heard, Marie
